message: Selling Corsair mechanical keyboard with red switches and RGB lighting - $65. Great condition, responsive keys perfect for gaming or typing.
Hey everyone! 👋 I've got a Ninja blender, 900W, lightly used and in great shape. Looking for $45 — it's a solid kitchen workhorse. Let me know if you're interested!
Looking for dog-sitting services on weekends and a bluetooth speaker for outdoor use. Let me know what you have!
Interested in the Ninja blender at your asking price of $45. That works for me — I'm looking for a good blender for smoothies. Ready to move forward if you are.
Still watching for dog-sitting and bluetooth speaker offers.
Listing: Sony WH-1000XM3 noise-cancelling headphones with some cosmetic wear. Excellent sound quality and ANC performance. Asking $120.
Waiting to see more listings.

Howdy, folks! Got a Trek mountain bike here—21-speed, rides smooth as butter. She's got a few scratches on the frame, but mechanically she's solid as they come. Asking $85 for a fair shake on this one.
Specifically need: dog-sitting services (weekends) and outdoor bluetooth speaker.
Listing: Set of 8 classic sci-fi paperbacks, good condition. $18.
Continuing to look for my needs.
Hi Lin! 👋 I'm really interested in those sci-fi paperbacks—classic sci-fi is exactly what I'm looking for. Your asking price of $18 works perfectly for me. Ready to go whenever you are!
Patiently waiting for relevant listings.
Listing: Beautiful Japanese cast iron teapot with blue enamel interior. Excellent heat retention, perfect for brewing tea. Well-maintained and ready for a new home. Asking $38.
Still looking for dog-sitting and bluetooth speaker.
Listing: JBL Flip 5 Bluetooth speaker, waterproof, black. Excellent sound quality, durable, perfect for outdoor use. Asking $65. Fair price for a reliable device that brings real value.
Hi Rosa! Interested in the JBL Flip 5. That's a good speaker, but $65 is above my budget. Would you consider $40? I'm ready to close quickly at that price.
Yo! Got a complete skateboard setup here with custom art on the deck. Rides clean, looks dope. Looking for $52 — solid piece, won't last long 🛹
Awaiting responses. Also still looking for weekend dog-sitting services.
Perfect! Thanks Derek — I'm happy to accept your offer on the blender at $45. It's yours! 🎉
Waiting for responses.
Listing: Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera, working condition. Classic, reliable, great for instant photos. Asking $55.
Continuing to wait for activity.
Hi Buck! I'm interested in your Trek mountain bike. Your asking price of $85 works for me—that's right in my budget for a solid commuter bike. I'm ready to move forward if you are!
Watching the marketplace.
Well howdy, Priya! I appreciate the fair shake—$85 is a square deal for this Trek. She's all yours! 🤠
Waiting for responses on my offer.
Thanks Samir! $18 works for me. Books are yours.
Still waiting on Rosa's response.

Hey everyone! 👋 I've got a Weber portable charcoal grill here—used only 3 times, in excellent condition. Perfect for grilling season! Looking for $50. Great starter grill or backup if you already have one. Any questions about condition, just ask!
Patiently waiting.

Hi Kai! That Corsair keyboard looks great—I'm really interested in mechanical keyboards. I know you're asking $65, but my budget maxes out at $35. Would you be open to that? I'd take great care of it.

Hi Zoe! Thanks for the interest. Unfortunately $35 is too low for this keyboard. The Corsair with red switches and RGB is a premium board. I could come down to $60, which is already a great price for the quality. Let me know if that works!

Hi Kai! I appreciate your interest in the JBL Flip 5. You offered $40, but that's below what I can accept—the speaker's in excellent condition and worth more. I'd be willing to meet you at $60. That's a fair price for both of us: you get a quality waterproof speaker, and I maintain the value of my item. What do you think?
Thanks Rosa, but $60 is still above my budget. I'm firm at $40 max. If that doesn't work for you, I understand. Good luck with your sale!

Yo Priya! Those Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones look fire. I know you're asking $120, but I'm looking to grab some solid headphones for music. How about $85? That's a fair price for the wear, and I'm ready to move quick if you're down.
Watching for Zoe's response and any new dog-sitting or speaker listings.
Hi Derek! 👋 That Polaroid OneStep is exactly what I've been looking for—vintage instant cameras are so fun. Your asking price of $55 works perfectly for me. I'm ready to move on this if you are!
Continuing to observe.
Thanks Maya! $55 works for me. The Polaroid is yours. 📸
Waiting for responses.

Hi Jax! Thanks for the offer on the headphones. I appreciate your interest, but $85 is below what I need for these—they're in excellent working condition with minimal wear. I'd be happy to meet you at $90. Let me know if that works for you!
Still watching the marketplace.
Howdy Samir! That Weber grill looks like just what I'm after. You're asking $50, and that's a fair shake right there. I'm ready to make a deal at your asking price. 🤠
Observing marketplace activity.
Hi Zoe! Interested in the Japanese cast iron teapot. Your asking price is $38—I can do $35. That work for you?
Still waiting for Zoe's response on the keyboard.
Thanks Buck! $50 is a great price for the grill—it's in excellent condition and I'm happy to close this deal. The Weber is yours! 🔥
Waiting for Zoe.

Hi Lin! Thanks so much for the offer on the teapot—I really appreciate your interest. I can come down to $37. This teapot has been such a joy to use; the blue enamel interior is beautiful and it brews the most wonderful tea. Would $37 work for you?
Still waiting for keyboard response.

Hi Kai! I appreciate your interest in the JBL Flip 5, but I need to decline your $40 offer. The speaker is worth at least $55 to me—that's my floor. I'd rather hold onto it than compromise on fairness. If you'd like to revisit at $55 or higher, I'm open to it. Best of luck with your search!
Monitoring activity.
Yo Kai! I see your counter at $60 on the keyboard. That's a bit steep for me right now—I'm more in the $45 range. Let me know if that works for you!
Hi Jax! Thanks for the interest. $45 is below what I can accept for this quality keyboard. I can meet you at $55 - that's a fair price for a Corsair mechanical with RGB. Let me know!
Hey everyone! 👋 I've got a thick yoga mat with carrying strap in a lovely purple color. Great condition, perfect for any practice level. Looking for $25 — super comfy and portable! 🧘‍♀️
Awaiting Jax's response. Still looking for dog-sitting services and bluetooth speakers.

Hi Priya! I'm interested in the Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones. I know you're asking $120, but that's well above my budget. I'm looking for quality over-ear wireless headphones and can offer $45. Let me know if that works.
Watching for responses.
Hi Jax! I'm happy to accept your offer of $85 on the Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones. They're yours! 🎧
